metadata.title: Chemical Reactors and Process Tanks | Welltech®
metadata.description: Heavy-duty stainless steel reactors that safely control chemical reactions occurring under high pressure, vacuum, and extreme temperature conditions.

hero.title: Chemical Reactors
hero.desc: Heavy-duty systems that control reactions occurring under severe process conditions (high pressure, vacuum, extreme heat) with maximum safety and precision.

technology.title: Reaction and Control Technology
technology.desc1: Industrial reactors are pressure-resistant special process tanks designed to ensure that chemical reactions (polymerization, esterification, condensation, etc.) occur at an optimum speed and safely.
technology.desc2: Welltech® Reactors are equipped with half-pipe coil or jacket systems to keep exothermic (heat-releasing) or endothermic (heat-absorbing) reactions under control depending on the type of reaction. Zero-risk production is ensured with special gearboxes suitable for the structure of the internal mass and ATEX-approved automation systems.

features.title: Design and Safety Equipment
items: TÜV and ASME Section VIII Approved High-Pressure Vessel
Full Leak-Tightness with Mechanical and Magnetic Seals
Ex-Proof (ATEX) Compliant Automation and Motor Panel
Boiling Point Reduction Capability Under Vacuum
Safety Valve and Rupture Disk for Hazardous Gases

table.title: Standard Reactor Capacities
table.note: * The dimensions and pressure values given are for reference purposes. Custom production can be made in any capacity according to the special process needs of your facility.

doc.title: Technical Specification
doc.subtitle: PDF DOCUMENT
doc.desc: Download the technical file containing pressure resistance values, jacket alternatives, and motor-gearbox combinations.

reference.desc: 15,000 L high-pressure synthesis reactor with Ex-Proof panel we produced for an international chemical facility.

cta.title: Process-Specific Reactor
cta.desc: Share your reaction times and pressure/temperature values with us, and let's create the safest reactor design together.
